ArabicDescription: المسح الأرضي لمسارات الخطوط الرئيسية والتفريعات
EnglishDescription: Field surveying of main  feeders, cables and branches routes (MV / LV,Transformers locations...etc ) specified by the Company .including site surveying to determine the best routes technically and economically, preparation of detailed topographical maps, showing all existing structures, roads, rail ways, mountains, wadis, networks of electricity,communication , water, petrol pipe lines ... etc. as per company requirements, with differnt scales as ( 1 : 10000 ) or ( 1 : 5000 ) or ( 1 : 2500 ) or (1:1000 ) and( 1 : 500 ) .The maps shall be submitted in hard copies as well as in e-copies, after final approval.the work includes determining the coordinates, data and images of equipment, cables, poles and meters in accordance with the Unified Database Model (UDM) and according to the approved spatial accuracy of no more than 25 cm and according to the company’s requirements, preparing lists of material quantities and pole types, placing a symbol key, providing a summary table for the entire path and obtaining the necessary R.O.W and permits from the relevant authorities.

ArabicDescription: تحديد الإحداثيات لموقع معين
EnglishDescription: Determination / marking of the coordinates for a specified location, including determination of location by concrete benchmark (20cm*20cm*50cm), 20cm depth with coloring the above part (30cm height fom ground level) and specify the coordination  using DGPS static method using Saudi Arabia National Spatial Reference System (SANSRS) maximum spatial accuraqcy 1cm, , prepare description cards to make it easy to reach

ArabicDescription: الرفع المساحي لمحطات التوزيع الرئيسية

ArabicDescription: الرفع المساحي للمعدات الارضية

ArabicDescription: الرفع المساحي لعداد واحد
